read_file.name: read_file
read_file.description: Read text content from a local file
read_file.returns: str — file content or error message

write_file.name: write_file
write_file.description: Write text content to a local file

fetch_webpage.name: fetch_webpage
fetch_webpage.description: Fetch the raw HTML content of a URL
fetch_webpage.returns: str — HTML content (truncated to 50k chars) or error message

run_python_expression.name: run_python_expression
run_python_expression.description: Evaluate a Python expression and return the result (math, logic, string ops)
run_python_expression.returns: str — result of the expression or error message

search_text.name: search_text
search_text.description: Search text using a regex pattern and return all matches
